title: optimization pass crashes with cmd error aborting
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.58+132 (git sha1 12cb8e951, g++ 11.4.0-1ubuntu1~22.04.2 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Run 
```
yosys -v 3 -p "                                                                                                                                                                          
read_verilog /tmp/test.v;
synth;
abc -script +resub,-K,8;,refactor,-z;,if,-K,4;,mfs2,-W,10;,mfs;,mfs2
"
```


### Expected Behavior

Normally optimization

### Actual Behavior

3.1. Extracting gate netlist of module `\fuzz_mwoqk' to `<abc-temp-dir>/input.blif'..
** cmd error: aborting 'source /tmp/yosys-abc-XXXXXX/abc.script'

[test.v.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24364921/test.v.zip)
